genre_refs: "How it started / How it's going" meme format
description: A side-by-side split-panel political meme built on the popular internet 'How it started / How it's going' before-and-after format. Both halves use a darkened, desaturated aerial photo of a shipping-container port/terminal as background. The left panel is tinted blue and headed 'HOW IT STARTED:' in bold white all-caps serif; it contains a white rounded card with a 'FOX BUSINESS' logo and the screenshot-style headline 'Manufacturing sector sheds 78K jobs in last three months' dated 'November 4, 2024' (the eve of the election, implicitly blaming the prior administration). The right panel is tinted neutral gray and headed 'HOW IT'S GOING:' with a white card bearing the 'FOX BUSINESS' logo and headline 'Foreign and domestic investments totaling over $5T under Trump, adds 451k jobs for Americans' dated 'April 22, 2025.' This is a designed partisan propaganda meme contrasting negative pre-Trump economic news with positive post-Trump news to credit the Trump administration for an economic turnaround. Technique: meme-format juxtaposition plus borrowed Fox Business headline authority; target audience is social-media users / Trump supporters.
notable_text: HOW IT STARTED: Manufacturing sector sheds 78K jobs in last three months - November 4, 2024; HOW IT'S GOING: Foreign and domestic investments totaling over $5T under Trump, adds 451k jobs for Americans - April 22, 2025
